phrases.intent_en: Where is the footbridge to old town?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a ponte pedonal para a cidade velha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH POHNG-tih peh-doo-NAHL PUH-ruh AH see-DAH-dih VEH-lyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Ponte Pedonal is a pedestrian bridge that connects the marina area to the historic old town of Lagos, crossing the canal.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the footbridge to old town?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a ponte pedonal para o centro antigo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH POHNG-tih peh-doo-NAHL PUH-ruh AW SAYNGT-roo ahnng-TEE-goo?
phrases.cultural_note: Directions combine pontoon numbers with simple turns for clarity in busy marina environments.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Ponte Pedonal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih peh-doo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the footbridge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the footbridge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih peh-doo-NAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Ponte Pedonal.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Porto de Recreio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POH-ruh-too DIH rehk-RAYOO?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Porto de Recreio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POH-ruh-too DIH rehk-RAYOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the marina basin.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the marina basin.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POH-ruh-too DIH rehk-RAYOO.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Porto de Recreio.

phrases.cultural_note: References to nearby establishments like O Marinheiro are common local landmarks for orientation.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Passeio Marítimo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO muh-REE-tee-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Waterfront Path.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Waterfront Path.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO muh-REE-tee-moo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Passeio Marítimo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the marina basin is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Porto de Recreio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POH-ruh-too DIH rehk-RAYOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Porto de Recreio is the main basin of Lagos Marina, where boats dock. Locals often refer to it simply as 'the marina'.

likely_response.translation_en: In the central area of the marina.

responses.english: In the central area of the marina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the marina reception is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a receção da marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH reh-sih-SOWN DUH muh-REE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Direct references to cais numbers are standard for marina navigation and staff communication.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a receção da marina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH reh-sih-SOWN DUH muh-REE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the marina reception.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the marina reception.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH reh-sih-SOWN DUH muh-REE-nuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a receção da marina.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Ponte Pedonal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih peh-doo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Old Town Bridge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Old Town Bridge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih peh-doo-NAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Ponte Pedonal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waterfront path starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começa o Passeio Marítimo aqui na marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AW puh-SAYOO muh-REE-tee-moo uh-KEE NUH muh-REE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff often reference specific pontoons for precise navigation along the waterfront.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para o Passeio Marítimo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO muh-REE-tee-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Waterfront Path.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the Waterfront Path.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-SAYOO muh-REE-tee-moo.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para o Passeio Marítimo.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bacia da marina?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH buh-SEEUH DUH muh-REE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The marina basin, Porto de Recreio, is the heart of the marina where all boat traffic is concentrated.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Porto de Recreio.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POH-ruh-too DIH rehk-RAYOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the marina basin.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the marina basin.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POH-ruh-too DIH rehk-RAYOO.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Porto de Recreio.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o cais número um?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYESH NOON-mih-roo OONNG?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff use sequential pontoon references as the primary spatial anchor in Portuguese marinas.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Cais 1.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH OOM.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH OOM.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Cais 1.
